title: American Medical Informatics Association
body: The American Medical Informatics Association (AMIA), is an American non-profit organization dedicated to the development and application of biomedical and health informatics in the support of patient care, teaching, research, and health care administration.
categories: Articles lacking reliable references from June 2014

Information technology organizations based in North America
